DNS lookup ==='' && dig +short search.hardart.cz 2>&1 || nslookup search.hardart.cz 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@157.90.169.205 "echo ''=== Nginx config for search.hardart.cz ==='' && cat /etc/nginx/sites-available/tulsio-meilisearch 2>&1; echo; echo ''=== Symlink check ==='' && ls -la /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ | grep tulsio-meili 2>&1; echo; echo ''=== Tulsio directory contents ==='' && ls /opt/tulsio/ 2>&1; echo; echo ''=== Search in tulsio project ==='' && grep -r ''search.hardart.cz'' /opt/tulsio/ --include=''*.ts'' --include=''*.js'' --include=''*.json'' --include=''*.env*'' --include=''*.yml'' --include=''*.yaml'' --include=''*.conf'' -l 2>&1; echo; echo ''=== DNS with nslookup ==='' && nslookup search.hardart.cz 2>&1; echo; echo ''=== Check if meilisearch service is running ==='' && systemctl status meilisearch 2>&1 | head -15")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@157.90.169.205 "echo ''=== All files with search.hardart.cz ==='' && grep -r ''search.hardart.cz'' /opt/server-monitor/ 2>/dev/null || echo ''No matches at all''; echo ''=== Check for domain list/config patterns ==='' && find /opt/server-monitor -name ''*.json'' -o -name ''*.env'' -o -name ''*.db'' -o -name ''*.sqlite'' -o -name ''*.yaml'' -o -name ''*.yml'' -o -name ''*.toml'' 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo ''=== Check for domains config in source ==='' && grep -r ''hardart'' /opt/server-monitor/server/ /opt/server-monitor/src/ --include=''*.ts'' --include=''*.tsx'' -l 2>/dev/null || echo ''No hardart matches in src/server''")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@157.90.169.205 "echo ''=== How are domains configured? ==='' && grep -rn ''domain\\|monitor\\|sites\\|urls\\|endpoints'' /opt/server-monitor/server/ --include=''*.ts'' -l 2>/dev/null && echo ''=== Check for meilisearch or search references ==='' && grep -rn ''meilisearch\\|search'' /opt/server-monitor/server/ /opt/server-monitor/src/ --include=''*.ts'' --include=''*.tsx'' 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | head -20")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@157.90.169.205 "rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/api.pellwood.com /etc/nginx/sites-available/api.pellwood.com && nginx -t 2>&1 && systemctl reload nginx && echo ''Done''")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@157.90.169.205 "echo ''=== DNS ==='' && dig +short api.pellwood.com 2>/dev/null && echo ''=== Nginx logs \(last 20 real requests\) ==='' && grep -v ''bot\\|crawler\\|spider\\|wp-\\|\\.php\\|xmlrpc'' /var/log/nginx/api.pellwood.access.log 2>/dev/null | tail -20 && echo ''=== Log size ==='' && wc -l /var/log/nginx/api.pellwood.access.log 2>/dev/null && echo ''=== PM2 pellwood ==='' && pm2 list 2>/dev/null | grep -i pellwood")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@157.90.169.205 "echo ''=== pellwood .env ==='' && cat /opt/pellwood/client/.env 2>/dev/null | grep -i api; echo ''=== grep api.pellwood in project ==='' && grep -r ''api.pellwood'' /opt/pellwood/ --include=''*.ts'' --include=''*.tsx'' --include=''*.js'' --include=''*.json'' --include=''*.env*'' -l 2>/dev/null")

Bash(ssh root@157.90.169.205 'sleep 3 && PASS=$\(grep AUTH_PASSWORD /opt/server-monitor/.env | cut -d= -f2\) && TOKEN=$\(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:4400/api/login -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ""{\\""password\\"": \\""$PASS\\""}"" -c - 2>/dev/null | grep sm_session | awk ""{print \\$NF}""\) && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:4400/api/monitor -b ""sm_session=$TOKEN"" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c ""import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\""{p[\\\\\\""name\\\\\\""]:25} status={p[\\\\\\""status\\\\\\""]:10} httpOk={p.get\(\\\\\\""httpOk\\\\\\"",\\\\\\""N/A\\\\\\""\)} domain={p.get\(\\\\\\""httpDomain\\\\\\"",\\\\\\""none\\\\\\""\)}\\""\) for p in d[\\\\\\""processes\\\\\\""]]""')

Bash(ssh root@157.90.169.205 'sleep 2 && PASS=$\(grep AUTH_PASSWORD /opt/server-monitor/.env | cut -d= -f2\) && RESP=$\(curl -s -c /tmp/sm_cookie -X POST http://127.0.0.1:4400/api/login -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ""{\\""password\\"": \\""'"$PASS"'\\""}""\) && echo ""Login: $RESP"" && curl -s -b /tmp/sm_cookie http://127.0.0.1:4400/api/monitor | python3 -c "":*)
